name: 01-minimal-stdio
description: Smallest valid AIBOM triplet: one MCP stdio component, one declared + one observed capability (fs:read) with empty qualifiers, no delta. Exercises baseline sidecar+CDX+bundle structure end-to-end.
notes: Template fixture. All other positive fixtures follow this structure, varying the capability payload, component count, and qualifier content. Evidence-record shape (top-level aibom.evidence[] with {id, kind, reference}) is provisional — proposed for formalization in a future schema-rule on the evidence-record ledger; see Review Questions in schema/fixtures/README.md.
